children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: After the Secretary makes the determination required by paragraph (2), the Secretary may not make a loan to a farmer or rancher under this subchapter unless the farmer or rancher has, or agrees to obtain, hazard insurance on the property to be acquired with the loan.

children.heading: Determination
children.label: 2 Determination
children.text: Not later than 180 days after , the Secretary shall determine the appropriate level of insurance to be required by paragraph (1).April 4, 1996

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Notwithstanding any other provision of this chapter, the Secretary may reserve a portion of any loan made under this subchapter to be placed in an unsupervised bank account that may be used at the discretion of the borrower for the basic family needs of the borrower and the immediate family of the borrower.

children.heading: Limit on size of the reserve
children.label: 2 Limit on size of the reserve
A
children.text: 10 percent of the loan;

children.label: C
children.text: the amount needed to provide for the basic family needs of the borrower and the borrower’s immediate family for 3 calendar months.

children.heading: Valuation of local or regional crops
children.label: e Valuation of local or regional crops

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall develop ways to determine unit prices (or other appropriate forms of valuation) for crops and other agricultural products, the end use of which is intended to be in locally or regionally produced agricultural food products, to facilitate lending to local and regional food producers.

children.heading: Price history
children.label: 2 Price history
children.text: The Secretary shall implement a mechanism for local and regional food producers to establish price history for the crops and other agricultural products produced by local and regional food producers.
